{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032203103984E1D0DC9A5378DD8A66"}"},"total":55},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7454282126893728536","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"给个中肯的评价，不要带入正常人的世界观去看无脑看还是挺好看的，有一点女版的古早味，可以当gb去看，还是可以的，还有，大大快更啊！！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1735607115,"group_id":"7422658640156298264","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"努力码子，喵喵喵喵～","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nx95L51xTTW5pOql+L6nZhRzgcYhDSmtck3R16M5MedC","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/db5d539a48984470835189c6844520f2~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776701075&x-signature=HUPM2OCX1AyOieU%2Fqw%2FCcQ7n%2FGc%3D","user_id":"1494930384751325","user_name":"桑果柚子"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1494930384751325","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7422658640156298264","book_info":{"abstract":"［女强男弱］［女攻］［非双洁］
帝国，一个古老庞大的国家。
帝国首都简称京都，由京圈控制，而在京圈之上的是帝国的王，十足的掌权者。
所以人敬她怕她，没想到有一天居然容许一个男人，在她头上作威作福。
“五亿两千九百万，能不能买到宝贝的第一夜？”
……
美好的日子总是短暂，阮鲤烁消失两个月的兄弟突然出现，神色慌张又极度恐惧。
“你不能跟她一起，她很危险!不是你表面上看到的那样，她、她就是个疯子!”
可当阮鲤烁意识到祁冉嗜杀成性，是一个披着狼皮的疯子时，他已经脱不了身，二十四小时的囚禁监视，折磨的他崩溃。
“姐姐求你放我出去，我受不了了，我真的快疯了……”
女人吻落在阮鲤烁眼角，吻住那滴泪水，轻声安抚。
“疯了才好，就不会想着离开姐姐。”
